Caroline is right for letter one, it is so hard dealing with a person who is so altered as a result of Alzheimer’s. Pick a time in your long marriage when he was at his best, his happiest, his strongest and when you were both very happy. Every time you remember the last year, make your mind go back to this version of your husband. For the second letter, stop overthinking, quietly tell your work friend how she spoke about you when she thought she weren’t there, and that’s why you would prefer not to meet with her. Just pick somewhere else to meet, and if she asks if you are getting together a small white lie is all that is needed!

From last-minute trims and blow-dry sessions to perfectly placed ribbons and gravity-defying hairstyles, the world's most pampered pooches are being primed to perfection as they prepare to strut into the spotlight at Crufts. Backstage at the world-famous dog show, Shih-tzus sport wacky topknots, poodles are fluffed and blow-dried into immaculate clouds of curls, and Yorkshire terriers sit patiently as their owners fuss over their silky coats. The grooming frenzy is all part of the meticulous preparation for the prestigious competition, where every strand of fur is carefully combed, brushed and styled before the dogs take to the ring.

I recently went to see one as my daughter said he got her grandad name and loads of other stuff correct, Did not get one name from any of my deceased family, kept stopping as though having a conversation with my Dad, nothing he said was accurate, said I see him sat in a chair near the window looking at the birds, well most old people sit near a window looking out, but my dads chair sat with his back facing the chair not looking out of the window, he was in the military, yep he was but people of his age did national service, says he was well educated like a teacher, nope worked down the pit, said nothing about any siblings and one is a very sick person so you would have thought that would have been raised, said you have arthritis in her knees, in my age group we usually do. In fact, he asked the names of my parents, ages, kids names, ages and professions and then said yes that’s what they are telling me. A total charlatan and I told my daughter do not waste your money.

Twenty-two years ago Maxine Carr walked free from prison - her lies making her the most hated woman in Britain. The ex-teaching assistant was given a new identity, a judge granting her a rare lifelong anonymity order for her own safety. Serving just half of a three-and-a-half year sentence for perverting the course of justice, she had given a false alibi for lover Ian Huntley on the night he murdered 10-year-olds Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman. Since she was freed rumours of her whereabouts have repeatedly circulated, with claims she has been moved to at least 10 different safehouses. A dozen women are feared to have been abused or attacked after being mistaken for her.

Living on a diet of toast, oven chips and a daily bottle of wine, this overweight father received a devastating wake-up call when doctors warned he was heading towards serious illness. Jason Smith, 56, was diagnosed with hypertension, high cholesterol and pre-diabetes after years of neglecting his health. But after the pounds continued to pile on and his self-confidence plummeted, the business consultant from West Sussex decided enough was enough. The result was a remarkable transformation - without using weight loss jabs or steroids. Within months, Mr Smith had lost 25kg, dropping from 96kg to 71kg and slashing his body fat from 28 per cent to below 10 per cent.
  • 193 comments
  • share I lost four stone and went from overweight dad to fitness star at 56

Who goes to see Machine Gun Kelly?

A Machine Gun Kelly fan suffered a mortifying moment after falling through a hole in the stage during the rapper's London concert on Thursday. The 35-year-old Bad Things hitmaker had been joined by a group of concertgoers as he performed at the O2 Arena when the shocking incident took place in a clip obtained by USA Today. Kelly was in the midst of belting out lyrics to his track Bloody Valentine when one of the fans started waving towards the crowd in encouragement to cheer.

  • 1 video
  • share Mortifying moment fan faceplants after falling from stage at MGK show
